Solist's Icy Wand  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Shock of Ice (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 5.0) at Level 12
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: WIZ
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Solist's Icy Wand
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Shock of Ice (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 5.0) at Level 12
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: WIZ
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Solist's Wand: Shock of Ice
Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:10 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:80
Submitted By:Mystikefini Ali
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-28 05:28:44
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 14,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 15
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Kurn's Tower
NPC Name
Burynai Excavator
lesser icebone skeleton


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kurn's Tower

# Apr 05 2006 at 12:04 PM Rating: Decent

139 posts
This may be very rare but I think 14k is a bit high. it is for new chars and NO newbie has that much Plat or even 5k is too much unless they are buying it off the internet. Not all new players have high level alts to supply them.

Nerfed..58 DD!
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2005 at 4:33 AM Rating: Decent
Ringkeeper
Scholar
45 posts
Shock of Ice was recently changed from 38 DD to a 58 DD, the change included this wand. This wand is a must for any twinks! Great toy later on as well.

RE: Nerfed..58 DD!
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2005 at 9:13 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
SO, how is that a nerf? A nerf would be something that ruins, or weakens the item, not something that makes it better.
▲ Page top
price
QuoteReply
# May 25 2005 at 1:36 PM Rating: Default
iganias
210 posts
i payed 24pp in the bazaar i think i got a good deal =)
▲ Page top
For Those Who Hadn't Figured This ...
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2004 at 11:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591800596180
113 posts
... this seems kinda silly, but nobody has really mentioned it. This item is terrific for building faction, for example, on a Kael raid or something like that. You can just pop each mob once, get the faction, never worry about drawing heavy aggro, etc., & never spend mana to do it.

It's also fun for farming decaying skellies & gnoll pups & other little critters, since one shot quite often kills the mob, & again, you're using no mana to do it.

Sure, there's probly other ways of doing all these things (Temp Flux staff is good for faction), but what the heck, the Icy Wand is still fun to play with. I have one, nobody wants to buy it for any price, so I'll happily keep it for my own Wizzie-to-be ... :)
▲ Page top
The Wand Woot!
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2004 at 2:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591814511754
21 posts
Yes it still drops, although rare might be a bit optimistic. I patrolled the areas mentioned below for DAYS without any luck, then one night just before bed decided to check again and third Excavator coughed it up. Downstairs lower level is where I got mine. 38 Damage no mana drop and I am a Lvl 16 Wizard, I am loving it!!! Oh and as far as selling it.... Dont even bother asking, this thing will sit with me a very long time.

Edited, Sun Sep 19 03:42:14 2004
▲ Page top
Dropped Today
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2004 at 1:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591800596180
113 posts
Burynai Excavator, just downstairs & through a door. Was yellow to 14th lvl Beastlord, easily single-pulled, didnt hit too hard. I was kinda surprised that it dropped the Wand.
▲ Page top
please help
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2004 at 4:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591798519925
13 posts
does this thing still drop?
I have killed 1000+ of these little bastards and I cant seem to get it ... I pull the whole lower lvl and kill them in 1 AE and then spend the rest of the respawn time looting them. The loot is all crap and I am waiting for that one time when i get to say WEEEE i got the wand that I have been looking for since lvl 16 :P
Another question... I am 52 now, will this even hit lvl 40 - 50 mobs. I wanted this to kill off the quad mobs that resist once and are the last standing, so i dont use mana killing that last one... will this work, or is this just going to me bank loot that i worked my *** off to get? I realize that it only hits for 38 and i will have to cast it a few times to even dent a mob, but i have this sinking feeling that they will brush it off... let me know... thanks
▲ Page top
Don't listen to me
QuoteReply
# Sep 30 2003 at 12:24 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592256016871
17 posts
Ok here is how I did this...Camp for a different item....dont even think about this item...kill everything you see for 2 weeks and loot nothing. Discover u are passing up on an item worth 3k plat...loot the next exc u see ...poof....wow I am lucky...also got the iskar bezeker club the same nite...I can duplicate this every time...:)


Fooguy Soulhatter
Fennin Ro
▲ Page top
still drops in kruns
QuoteReply
# Sep 06 2003 at 3:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259007294
View User Forum
6 posts
still drops in kruns in the lower level of the basement .. got one to night 9/5/03 ...
▲ Page top
same here it popped
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2003 at 6:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591790745350
View User Forum
13 posts
gpt mine of the first burynai on the way downstairs. Had my poor litttle level 16 rogue soloing down there, (twinked as much as can be, except ikky, not fungi) just finished killing a greater, and a lesser icebone, when that gerbil attacked. I was very shocked to see the wand. I never knew it dropped there, and i have spent hours, well over 100 hours just messing with the badgers with my other classes. My lev 54 cleric goes down there pulls about 20 then hits them with the aoe, and they all fall down :) Kills the monotny when not finding a group for pod or poi =)

The Black Rider still lives! Vallon Zek all the way!

▲ Page top
Am I missing Something?
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2003 at 5:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1608509760454
21 posts
Why the heck is this item worth so much? A level 8 spell...no stats...Am I missing something?
▲ Page top
RE: Am I missing Something?
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2005 at 10:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801678987
344 posts
Manaless damage. Every wizard has used up all their mana on a mob, once, but was unable to kill it once it started walking away, because their weapon skills are nonexistant (or they don't even have a weapon). 50dmg is a lot more than H2Hing something for 2 dmg every 15 swings.
▲ Page top
hmm
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2003 at 12:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760063884
174 posts
why is this worth 3k? because its a free nuke no having to cast any other spells when u go oom u can click this till the fite is over instead of sitting out the rest of it.

Edited, Sun Aug 3 03:54:50 2003
▲ Page top
RE: hmm
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2004 at 5:16 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1627863539012
View User Forum
197 posts
because with an Horse/drogmor you still regen mana while casting spells ( work with this clicky 1hb too )

Didn't see this mentioned anywhere so I thought i'd add it...
This item must be equiped in primary or secondary slot to be used and has a 5 second cast time.

It Drops
QuoteReply
# Nov 07 2002 at 7:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783238992
166 posts
Just got one today not even very far in. My first ever Burnai Excavator I just slowed, poisoned, diseased and knocked the crap out of with my Mudman enforcer and it dropped. Suffice to say after all this time I was surprized to see an item this useful drop off anything in kunark, I hope I can sell and get some nifty new shaman gear.

# Aug 31 2002 at 3:13 PM Rating: Decent

i had been lvling in kurns for a day or two, and i died. when i was running back i saw this dead excavator so i decided i might as well loot it. The excavator had the wand on it. Someone missed out big.

Wand...
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2002 at 7:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782072236
4 posts
I stayed in Kurns' for a week and it never dropped. I finally bought one for about 3K. Totally worth it. Being able to chain cast this thing without using mana, rules!

I have seen the wand for sale on Luclin for much cheaper than 3k, by the way...

it still drops.....i got it tonight off the teddybear that pops right inside of door behind steps....I didnt know what it was cause it didnt have any HP info .........
